summary: The implementation successfully addresses all core requirements for the syllabus tracker with chapters and study timer functionality. Backend includes chapter data model with persistent storage, user access control, and methods for chapter creation, status updates, and study time tracking. Frontend implements a complete syllabus tracker page with chapter creation form, study timer with chapter selection, daily goal setting, and real-time dashboard updates. All requirements appear to be implemented with proper evidence in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Display individual study time for each chapter in the chapter list
missing_requirements.reason: The SyllabusTrackerPage.tsx shows a progress report section with aggregate statistics (total, completed, pending counts) but the diff is truncated and does not show evidence of a chapter list rendering individual chapters with their names, status badges, and individual study times

missing_requirements.requirement: Add status toggle functionality on each chapter item to switch between Pending and Completed states
missing_requirements.reason: While useUpdateChapterStatus hook exists in useQueries.ts, the SyllabusTrackerPage.tsx diff is truncated and does not show evidence of clickable status badges or toggle controls on individual chapter list items
